{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260324105710112B333929636320BD68"}"},"total":4978},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7061469375790400292","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"真的超级喜欢，第一次追没有完结的书，希望宣宣和陆总能够克服困难走到一起，我觉得谢大哥真的很好，还有周教练，希望他们都能找到真爱，里面的每一对我都很喜欢，不仅有男男的，还有男女的，剧情也很好，并没有太玛丽苏，看到山区那一部分，觉得宣宣好善良，希望作者能快点更新，"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1644126463,"group_id":"6989971295404297229","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2WpKLI+kdcmWv4BWsHW1PE=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"396300941271981","user_name":"爱吃干贝绣球的晓玥"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"396300941271981","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6989971295404297229","book_info":{"abstract":"【甜宠+穿书+娱乐圈+已完结】
　　顾宣一觉醒来穿到虐恋文里成了满嘴谎言、攀附权贵的同名小炮灰，最后惨死收场。
　　作为母胎solo钢铁直男的顾宣来说，炮灰神马的谁爱当谁当去，这满世界没人疼没人爱的小姐姐们不香吗？
　　谁料。
　　呔！
　　他怎么被主角壁咚了？

书中人物刻画的非常棒，各有各的特性。陆深的外冷心热，陆宣的温柔坚决；陆夏的活泼可爱，杜凡为了陆夏放弃简单生活；方野为了霍霆跃重回自己厌恶的刀尖舔血的生活；肖乐与余岁之间的爱与救赎；窦佳佳与谢礼桥的相互暗恋；出生在豪门的赵杉杉，看似游戏人间，实则深陷囹圄，不得挣脱。还有好几对儿就不写啦。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1657417529,"group_id":"6989971295404297229","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"在黑暗里寻找光明","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N1AWwvp3iIe2GSJY0+wJCbDtKH3v8ap6kCjDOuGh9eUD","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/88674336785442d18fd3d34d70e0629f~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776878131&x-signature=9RNnUjySX1pS0yOiEHxyuKogoRs%3D","user_id":"3114267074376301","user_name":"溟洲"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3114267074376301","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1749220758,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"活动专属","bg_color":"#FFFFFF","can_worn":false,"id":17,"name":"击穿次元","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/47c082300352c1a9e6e7669d207df6fb","sticker_type":2,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/57235e9992067573933a8f743e5f9044"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6989971295404297229","book_info":{"abstract":"【甜宠+穿书+娱乐圈+已完结】
